title: Dirt Road
description: Exploring existential crisis and loss of faith.
lyrics: That's what I'm saying, I'm gonna kill us. Kill us in the streets, man. Kill us every week. I don't fucking know. Do you think he's still here? Is he? Yeah. Yeah, he's still there.   What's that? He literally misses. Can you hear him? Yeah. Your God is dead. No one cares if there is a hell. I won't see you there. I'm fucking dead. God is dead and God is dead. But if there's hell I see, it's hell I see in me. I'm number one, I'm number two. Are you number three? I'm number seven. I'm number eight. You're gonna make me blue. Are we going out or blue? Are we really blue? Can you make me blue? Can you make me blue? I just want what you got. I just want what you have. Why can't I be? Why are you here? I simply got to carry you. Don't worry, I'm happy. I'm here with you. No, no, no, no. It's okay. I can get it tomorrow. Really? What? God is dead. No one cares if there is a hell. I won't see you there. Say your prayers, I'll see you there. God is dead. He's so dead. No one cares if there is a hell. Say your prayers, I'll see you there. I'll see you there. Why you see that in your head? And think about mistakes and think about the blood. I won't tell you in my head. Oh, your God is dead. Your God is dead. No one cares. Dwells in the wards, I'm scared. Your God is... Jesus, he's been dead for a minute, right? 2021, we write the tales of tales. The people of God, they've frozen. Their lives are in hell. And their God is... so fucking dead. Hell is here. I'll see you there. But in the hell, I must fear. Holy, die for your sins too. Keep them inside and melt. I'll see you there. I'll see you there. I'll see you there. I'll see you there. I'll see you there.
